Item.name: Mtundu Zonse Zomwe Zimachitika pa Chizindikiro
Tsegulani Foda ngati Malo Ogwirira Ntchito...
Sanjani Mizere Monga Nambala Yokwera Yokwera
Sanjani Mizere Monga Ma Nambala Akutsika
Sanjani Mizere Monga Ma Desimali (Comma) Kukwera
Sankhani Mizere Monga Ma Desimali (Comma) Yotsika
Sanjani Mizere Monga Ma Desimali (Madontho) Okwera
Sankhani Mizere Monga Ma Desimali (Dot) Kutsika
Tsegulani Chikwatu chomwe chili mu Explorer
Dumphani Panopo Pitani ku Next Multi-select
Chepetsa zonse ndi EOL mpaka Space
Chotsani Mizere Yopanda kanthu (yokhala ndi zilembo Zopanda kanthu)
Ikani Mzere Wopanda Pamwamba Pamwamba Pano
Ikani Mzere Wopanda Pansi Pansi Pano
Pangani kuchokera pazosankha kukhala pa bolodi
Pangani kuchokera pazosankha kukhala pa bolodi
Pangani kuchokera pazosankha kukhala pa bolodi
Pangani kuchokera pazosankha kukhala pa bolodi
Tsegulani Chikwatu chomwe chili mu Explorer
Tsegulani Chikwatu chomwe chili ngati Malo Ogwirira Ntchito
Bwezerani Zonse mu Zolemba Zonse Zotsegulidwa
Pezani Zonse mu Zolemba Zonse Zotsegulidwa
⤵ Koperani kuchokera ku Find to Replace
⤴ Koperani kuchokera ku Replace to Find
Chitani mzere uliwonse ngati chingwe chosiyana

SHA256FromFilesDlg.title: Pangani digest ya SHA-256 kuchokera pamafayilo

Item.name: Chitani mzere uliwonse ngati chingwe chosiyana

SHA1FromFilesDlg.title: Pangani digest ya SHA-1 kuchokera pamafayilo

Item.name: Chitani mzere uliwonse ngati chingwe chosiyana
Chitani mzere uliwonse ngati chingwe chosiyana
Limbikitsani kusankha kukula kwa zilembo pamasitayelo onse
Limbikitsani kusankha molimba mtima pamasitayelo onse
Limbikitsani kusankha pansi pamzere pamasitayelo onse
Tsegulani chikwatu chomwe chili mu Explorer
Tsegulani chikwatu chomwe chili mu Command Prompt
Kusintha kwa EOL kupita ku Unix (LF)
Sitanileni zonse pogwiritsa ntchito kalembedwe kachitatu
Sitanileni zonse pogwiritsa ntchito sitayilo yachisanu
Mtundu woyamba pogwiritsa ntchito mtundu woyamba
Mtundu woyamba pogwiritsa ntchito kalembedwe kachitatu
Mtundu wam'mbuyo wa kalembedwe ka Pezani Mark
Mtundu wotsatira wa kalembedwe ka Pezani Mark
Copy Styled Text of All Styles
Copy Styled Text ya kalembedwe ka Find Mark
Sinthani Foda ngati Malo Ogwirira Ntchito
Sinthani ku Foda ngati Malo Ogwirira Ntchito
Sanjani ndi Dzina A mpaka Z
Sanjani ndi Dzina Z mpaka A
Sanjani ndi Njira A mpaka Z
Sanjani ndi Njira Z kupita ku A
Sanjani ndi Mtundu A mpaka Z
Sanjani ndi Mtundu Z mpaka A
Izi zichotsa njira yachidule pa lamulo ili
Bisani (gwiritsani ntchito makiyi a Alt kapena F10 kuti musinthe)
Sinthani mtundu wa tabu yosagwira ntchito
Jambulani kapamwamba kokhala pa tabu yogwira
Pangani malamulo amakono opinda / osatsegula kuti azitha kusintha
Letsani kusuntha kwapamwamba chifukwa cha vuto la touchpad
Sungani zosankha mukadina kumanja kunja kwa zomwe mwasankha
Ikani mtundu womwe mwasankha pamawu osankhidwa
Yambitsani Kusankha Mzati Kuti Musinthe Zambiri
Ikani zoikamo Maonekedwe ku C0, C1 Unicode EOL
Letsani zilembo zowongolera (C0 code) kulemba mu chikalata
UTF-16 Big Endian yokhala ndi BOM
UTF-16 Little Endian yokhala ndi BOM
Tsegulani chikalata chatsopano nthawi zonse poyambira
Gwiritsani ntchito mzere woyamba wa chikalata ngati dzina lopanda dzina
Kumbukirani chikwatu chomwe chagwiritsidwa ntchito komaliza
Tsegulani mafayilo onse a foda m'malo moyambitsa Foda ngati Malo Ogwirira Ntchito pafoda yotsitsa
Chonde tulukani Nextpad++ ndikuyambitsanso Nextpad++ mu Administrator mode kuti mugwiritse ntchito izi.
Pangani menyu ya chinenero kukhala yogwirizana
Tetezani backslash ngati mawonekedwe othawa a SQL
Backspace key unindents m'malo mochotsa malo amodzi
Mtundu Zonse Zomwe Zimachitika pa Chizindikiro
Gwiritsani ntchito font yokhala ndi malo amodzi mu bokosi la Pezani (Muyenera kuyambitsanso Nextpad++)
Pezani kukambirana kumakhalabe kotsegula pambuyo kusaka komwe kumatuluka pazenera lazotsatira
Tsimikizirani Kusintha Zonse M'ma Documents Onse Otsegulidwa
Zenera la Zotsatira Zosaka: onetsani cholowera chimodzi pamzere wopezeka ngati nkotheka
Lembani Pezani Munda Ndi Malemba Osankhidwa
Sankhani Mawu Pansi pa Caret Pamene Palibe Chosankhidwa
Lembani Pezani mu Files Directory Field Kutengera Active Document
: Makhalidwe Aakulu Kuti Adzaze-Mokha Kupeza Munda kuchokera Kusankhidwa
Chithunzi cha gawo ndi zosunga zobwezeretsera nthawi ndi nthawi
Yambitsani chithunzithunzi cha gawo ndi zosunga zobwezeretsera nthawi ndi nthawi
Kumbukirani mafayilo osafikirika a gawo lapitalo
Tsegulani gawo muzochitika zatsopano (ndikusunga gawo pokhapokha mutatuluka)
* Kusintha kwa izi kuyenera kuyambitsanso Nextpad++
Sinthani Mwamakonda Anu Ikani Nthawi Ya Tsiku
Bwezerani sinthani dongosolo la nthawi (mawonekedwe aatali aatali)
Kumbukirani mawonekedwe a gulu (gulu lotseguka) nthawi zina (mawonekedwe amitundu yambiri) kapena mukamagwiritsa ntchito mzere wolamula [-nosession]
Zokonda zosankha za Delimiter (Ctrl + Mouse dinani kawiri)
Gwiritsani ntchito mndandanda wa zilembo za Mawu monga momwe zilili
Onjezani chikhalidwe chanu ngati gawo la mawu (musasankhe pokhapokha mutadziwa zomwe mukuchita)
Yambitsani Kuletsa Mafayilo Aakulu (palibe kuwunikira kwa mawu)
Chotsani Kukulunga kwa Mawu padziko lonse
Lolani Ulalo Wodina Ulalo wa URL
Onetsani dzina lafayilo lokha mu bar yamutu

Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kusunga zolemba zonse zosinthidwa?
Sankhani "Nthawi zonse inde" ngati simukufuna kuwonanso zokambiranazi. Mutha kuyambitsanso zokambiranazi mu Zokonda pambuyo pake.
Koperani zambiri za debug pa clipboard
Palibe git repository\nGwiritsani ntchito Sakatulani kuti mutsegule repo.
Jambulani macro choyamba pogwiritsa ntchito Start Recording.
Onetsani njira yonse ya fayilo mu bar yamutu
Yambitsaninso pulogalamu kuti mutsegule mapulagini omwe adayikidwa.
Dzina la lamulo la Run menyu
Pezani mu Projects: Simunalumikizidwebe pamndandanda wamafayilo a Project Panel.
Gwiritsani ntchito ma tabu (m'malo mwa mipata)
Kumbukirani mawonekedwe a gulu lonse la magawo
Sungani zolemba zamafayilo zomwe palibe mu gawo
Gwiritsani ntchito font ya monospaced mu Pezani dialog
Gwiritsani ntchito zigawo za mndandanda wa XML
Sankhani fayilo ya XML ya Notepad ++ yoti mugwiritse ntchito
Ziwerengero ziyenera kukhala 0-255 ndipo chiyambi chiyenera kukhala <= mapeto.
Yambitsaninso Nextpad++ kuti muyambitsenso nkhani yokhazikikaMenu.xml.
Fayilo ili ndi zosintha zosasungidwa.Kutsegulanso ndi encoding yatsopano kudzawataya.Pitirizani?
Mafayilo owonjezera a zilankhulo (.xml) atha kuikidwa mu:
Dumphani Current amp;Pitani ku Next Multi-select

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: Kusintha contextMenu
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: Kusintha contextMenu.xml kumakupatsani mwayi wosintha menyu yanu ya Nextpad++ popup. Muyenera kuyambitsanso Nextpad++ yanu kuti iyambe kugwira ntchito mutasintha contextMenu.xml.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: Sungani Zosintha Pano
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
Muyenera kusunga zosintha zapano. Zosintha zonse zosungidwa sizingasinthidwe.
Pitirizani?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: Kutaya Kuthetsa Kutha Chenjezo
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
Muyenera kusunga zosintha zapano. Zosintha zonse zosungidwa sizingasinthidwe.
Pitirizani?

DocReloadWarning.title: Kwezaninso
DocReloadWarning.message: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kutsitsanso fayilo yomwe ilipo ndikutaya zosintha zomwe zachitika mu Nextpad++?

FileLockedWarning.title: Kusunga kwalephera
FileLockedWarning.message: Chonde onani ngati fayiloyi yatsegulidwa mu pulogalamu ina

RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.title: Kutchulanso kwalephera
RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.message: Dzina lotchulidwa likugwiritsidwa ntchito pa tabu ina.

RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.title: Kutchulanso kwalephera
RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.message: Dzina lotchulidwa silingakhale lopanda kanthu, kapena silingakhale ndi malo okha kapena TAB(ma).

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Kuchuluka kwa mafayilo oti mutsegule ndikwambiri
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure you want to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Zokonda pa Cloud
SettingsOnCloudError.message: Zikuwoneka kuti njira yosinthira pamtambo imayikidwa pa drive yokhayo yowerengera, kapena pa chikwatu chomwe chimafunikira mwayi wokhala ndi mwayi wolembera. Zokonda zanu pamtambo zichotsedwa.Chonde yambitsaninso mtengo wogwirizana kudzera muzokambirana Zokonda.

DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.title: Zochita zosalondola
DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.message: Mutha kugwetsa mafayilo kapena zikwatu koma osati zonse ziwiri, chifukwa mukugwetsa Foda ngati Project mode. Muyenera kuyatsa "Tsegulani mafayilo onse a foda m'malo moyambitsa Foda ngati Malo Ogwirira Ntchito pafoda yotsitsa" mu gawo la "Default Directory" la Zokonda kuti ntchitoyi igwire ntchito.

SortingError.title: Vuto Losanja
SortingError.message: Takanika kusanja manambala chifukwa cha mzere $INT_REPLACE$.

ColumnModeTip.title: Upangiri Wamgawo Lazanja
ColumnModeTip.message:
Pali njira zitatu zosinthira kukhala mulingo wosankha:
1. (Kiyibodi ndi Mouse) Gwirani Alt pamene dinani-kumanzere kukokera
2. (Kiyibodi yokha) Gwirani Alt+Shift mukugwiritsa ntchito mivi
3. (Kiyibodi kapena Mouse) Ikani caret poyambira pomwe mukufuna pa block block, ndiye perekani lamulo la "Yambani / Mapeto Sankhani mu Column Mode"; Sonkhanitsani caret kumapeto komwe mukufuna kwa block block, ndiye perekani "Yambani/Mapeto Sankhani mu Column Mode" lamulo kachiwiri

DoCloseOrNot.title: Sungani fayilo yomwe siilipo
DoCloseOrNot.message: Fayilo "$STR_REPLACE$" kulibenso. Kodi mungasunge fayilo ili mumkonzi?

DoDeleteOrNot.title: Chotsani fayilo
DoDeleteOrNot.message: Fayilo "$STR_REPLACE$" idzasunthidwa ku Recycle Bin yanu ndipo chikalatachi chidzatsekedwa. Pitirizani?

NoBackupDoSaveFile.title: Sungani
NoBackupDoSaveFile.message: Fayilo yanu yosunga zobwezeretsera siyingapezeke (yachotsedwa kunja). Sungani apo ayi deta yanu idzatayika Mukufuna kusunga fayilo "$STR_REPLACE$" ?

DoReloadOrNot.title: Kwezaninso
DoReloadOrNot.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Fayiloyi yasinthidwa ndi pulogalamu ina. Kodi mukufuna kuyiyikanso?

DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.title: Kwezaninso
DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Fayiloyi yasinthidwa ndi pulogalamu ina. Kodi mukufuna kuyiyikanso ndikutaya zosintha zomwe zachitika mu Nextpad++?

PrehistoricSystemDetected.title: Mbiri yakale yapezeka
PrehistoricSystemDetected.message: Zikuwoneka kuti mukugwiritsabe ntchito mbiri yakale.Izi zimagwira ntchito pamakina amakono okha, pepani.

XpUpdaterProblem.title: Nextpad++ Updater
XpUpdaterProblem.message: Nextpad++ updater sagwirizana ndi XP chifukwa chachitetezo chosatha cha XP. Kodi mukufuna kupita patsamba la Nextpad++ kuti mutsitse mtundu waposachedwa?

GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.title: Zokonda pa Proxy
GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.message: Chonde yambitsaninso Nextpad++ mumchitidwe Woyang'anira kuti mukhazikitse proxy.

DocTooDirtyToMonitor.title: Vuto loyang'anira
DocTooDirtyToMonitor.message: Chikalatacho ndi chonyansa.Chonde sungani zosinthazo musanaziyang'anire.

FileTooBigToOpen.title: Vuto la kukula kwa fayilo
FileTooBigToOpen.message: Fayilo ndi yayikulu kwambiri kuti isatsegulidwe ndi Nextpad++

WantToOpenHugeFile.title: Kutsegula chenjezo lalikulu la fayilo
WantToOpenHugeFile.message: Kutsegula fayilo yayikulu ya 2GB + kungatenge mphindi zingapo. Mukufuna kutsegula?

FileBackupFailed.title: Kusunga Fayilo Kwalephera
FileBackupFailed.message:
Fayilo yam'mbuyomu sinathe kusungidwa muzosunga zosunga zobwezeretsera pa "$STR_REPLACE$".
Mukufuna kusunga fayilo yomwe ilipo?

LoadLangsFailed.title: Configurator
LoadLangsFailed.message: Kutsegula langs.xml kwalephera! Kodi mukufuna kupezanso langs.xml yanu?

FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.title: Foda ngati Malo Ogwirira ntchito ndikuwonjezera vuto la foda
FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.message: Chikwatu chaching'ono cha chikwatu chomwe mukufuna kuwonjezera chilipo. Chonde chotsani mizu yake pagulu musanawonjezere chikwatu "$STR_REPLACE$".

ProjectPanelChanged.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelChanged.message: Malo ogwirira ntchito adasinthidwa.Kodi mukufuna kuchisunga?

ProjectPanelSaveError.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelSaveError.message: Panali cholakwika polemba fayilo yanu yakumalo ogwirira ntchito. Malo anu ogwirira ntchito sanasungidwe.

ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Tsegulani Malo Ogwirira Ntchito
ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Malo ogwirira ntchito pano asinthidwa.Mukufuna kusunga pulojekiti yamakono?

ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Malo Atsopano Ogwirira Ntchito
ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Malo ogwirira ntchito pano asinthidwa.Mukufuna kusunga pulojekiti yamakono?

ProjectPanelOpenFailed.title: Tsegulani Malo Ogwirira Ntchito
ProjectPanelOpenFailed.message: Malo ogwirira ntchito sanatsegulidwe. Zikuwoneka kuti fayilo yotsegula si fayilo yovomerezeka.

ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.title: Chotsani chikwatu ku polojekiti
ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.message: Zonse zazing'ono zidzachotsedwa. Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa chikwatuchi?

ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.title: Chotsani fayilo ku polojekiti
ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.message: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa fayiloyi?

ProjectPanelReloadDirty.title: Kwezaninso Malo Ogwirira Ntchito
ProjectPanelReloadDirty.message: Malo ogwirira ntchito pano asinthidwa.Kutsegulanso kudzataya zosintha zonse. Kodi mukufuna kupitiriza?

UDLNewNameError.title: Vuto la UDL
UDLNewNameError.message: Dzinali limagwiritsidwa ntchito ndi chilankhulo china, chonde perekani ina.

UDL_saveBeforeImport.title: Chinenero Chofotokozedwa ndi Mtumiki
UDL_saveBeforeImport.message: Musanatumize, sungani tanthauzo la chilankhulo chanu podina "Save As..." batani.

SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.title: Mukutsimikiza?
SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.message: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa njira yachiduleyi?

OpenInAdminMode.title: Kusunga kwalephera
OpenInAdminMode.message: Fayiloyo siyingasungidwe ndipo ikhoza kutetezedwa. Kodi mukufuna kukhazikitsa Nextpad++ mu Administrator mode?

OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.title: Kusunga kwalephera
OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.message: Fayiloyo siyingasungidwe ndipo ikhoza kutetezedwa. Kodi mukufuna kukhazikitsa Nextpad++ mu Administrator mode?

ExitToUpdatePlugins.title: Nextpad++ yatsala pang'ono kutuluka
ExitToUpdatePlugins.message: Mukadina YES, mudzasiya Notepad ++ kuti mupitirize kugwira ntchito. Notepad ++ idzayambiranso ntchito zonse zitathetsedwa. Pitirizani?

NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.title: Notepad ++ ikuyenera kukhazikitsidwanso
NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.message: Muyenera kuyambitsanso Notepad ++ kuti mutsegule mapulagini omwe mudayika.

ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.title: Notepad ++ ikuyenera kukhazikitsidwanso
ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.message: Muyenera kuyambitsanso Notepad ++ kuti muthe Kusintha Mbiri.

WindowsSessionExit.title: Nextpad++ - kutuluka kwa gawo la Windows
WindowsSessionExit.message: Windows gawo latsala pang'ono kuthetsedwa koma muli ndi zina zomwe sizinasungidwe.Kodi mukufuna kutuluka Nextpad++ tsopano?

SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.title: $STR_REPLACE$
SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.message: Zosintha zosasungidwa zatsala pang'ono kutayidwa! Kodi mukufuna kusunga zosintha zanu musanasinthe mitu?

MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.title: Kugwirizana kwa Ma Macro ndi Run Commands
MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.message:
Malamulo anu a Macro ndi Run osungidwa mu Notepad ++ v.8.5.2 (kapena apamwamba) sangagwirizane ndi Notepad ++ yamakono. Chonde yesani malamulowo ndipo, ngati pakufunika, sinthaninso.
Kapenanso, mutha kutsitsa ku Notepad ++ v8.5.2 ndikubwezeretsanso deta yanu yam'mbuyo. Nextpad++ idzasunga "shortcuts.xml" yanu yakale ndikuisunga ngati "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup". Kutchulanso "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup" -> "shortcuts.xml", malamulo anu ayenera kubwezeretsedwa ndikugwira ntchito moyenera.

FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.title: Kusunga kwalephera
FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.message: Sitingathe kusunga fayilo. Njira ya Notepad ++ yoletsa kuwerenga-yokha yoletsedwa idalepheretsa fayilo kusungidwa.

NotEnoughRoom4Saving.title: Kusunga kwalephera
NotEnoughRoom4Saving.message: Zalephera kusunga fayilo. Zikuwoneka kuti palibe malo okwanira pa disk kusunga fayilo.Fayilo yanu sinasungidwe.

FileInaccessibleUserSession.title: Fayilo siyikupezeka
FileInaccessibleUserSession.message:
Mafayilo ena agawo lanu losungidwa pamanja "$STR_REPLACE$" ndizosatheka.Atha kutsegulidwa ngati zolemba zopanda kanthu komanso zowerengera zokha ngati zosungira malo.
Mukufuna kupanga zosungiramo malo?
ZINDIKIRANI: Kusankha kusapanga zoikira malo kapena kuzitseka pambuyo pake, gawo lanu losungidwa pamanja SIDZAsinthidwa potuluka.

FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.title: Fayilo siyikupezeka
FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.message:
Mafayilo ena amgawo lanu lapitalo sakupezeka.Atha kutsegulidwa ngati zolemba zopanda kanthu komanso zowerengera zokha ngati zosungira malo.
Mukufuna kupanga zosungiramo malo?
ZINDIKIRANI: Kusankha kusapanga zoikira malo kapena kuzitseka pambuyo pake, gawo lanu LIDZASINTHA POTUMUKA!Tikukulangizani kuti musunge "session.xml" yanu tsopano.

RTLvsDirectWrite.title: Sitingathe kuyendetsa RTL
RTLvsDirectWrite.message: RTL siyogwirizana ndi DirectWrite mode.Chonde zimitsani DirectWrite mode mu MISC.gawo la Zokonda kukambirana, ndikuyambitsanso Notepad ++.

FileMemoryAllocationFailed.title: Kupatulapo: Kugawa mafayilo kwalephera
FileMemoryAllocationFailed.message: Mwina palibe kukumbukira kokwanira kokwanira kwa fayilo yomwe ikukwezedwa ndi Notepad ++.

FindRegexBackwardDisabled.title: Kusaka kwa Regex kumbuyo kwayimitsidwa
FindRegexBackwardDisabled.message:
Mwachisawawa, kusaka kwa regex yakumbuyo kumayimitsidwa chifukwa cha zotsatira zosayembekezereka.Kuti mufufuze chakumbuyo, tsegulani bokosi lakuti Pezani ndikusankha zosaka zanthawi zonse kapena zowonjezera m'malo mongonena zanthawi zonse. Dinani batani la OK kuti mutsegule bokosi la Pezani kapena ikani kuyang'ana pa izo.
Ngati mukufuna kusaka kwa regex yakumbuyo, funsani buku la ogwiritsa ntchito kuti mupeze malangizo a momwe mungathandizire.

FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.title: Fufuzani chenjezo
FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.message: Bokosi la "Mu kusankha" lasinthidwa zokha. Chonde tsimikizirani zosaka musanachite.

Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.title: Notepad ++ ikufunika kuyambiranso
Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.message: Notepad ++ ikufunika kuyambiranso kuti iwonetse njira zazifupi za menyu.

NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.title: Kusintha fayilo yowerengera-yokha kwalephera
NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.message: Chonde yendetsani Notepad ++ ngati woyang'anira kuti musinthe mawonekedwe a fayilo.

PreferencesInitialSort.name: Sinthani magwiridwe antchito (A mpaka Z) mokhazikika

SelectFolderFromBrowserString.name: Sankhani chikwatu choti muwonjezere mu Foda ngati gulu la Workspace

word-chars-list-tip.value: Izi zimakupatsani mwayi kuti muphatikize zilembo zamawu apano pomwe mukudina kawiri kuti musankhe kapena mukusaka ndi njira ya "Fananizani mawu okha" yosindikizidwa.

eol-custom-color-tip.value: Pitani ku Style Configurator kuti musinthe mtundu wokhazikika wa EOL ("EOL custom color")..

backup-select-folder.value: Sankhani chikwatu ngati chikwatu zosunga zobwezeretsera

cloud-restart-warning.value: Chonde yambitsaninso Nextpad++ kuti igwire ntchito.

cloud-select-folder.value: Sankhani chikwatu kuchokera/komwe Nextpad++ imawerenga/kulemba zoikamo zake

shift-change-direction-tip.value: Gwiritsani ntchito Shift+Enter kuti mufufuze mbali ina

find-in-files-filter-tip.value:
Pezani mu cpp, cxx, h, hxx hpp: *.cpp *.cxx *.h *.hxx *.hpp
Pezani mafayilo onse kupatula exe, obj log: *.* !*.exe !*.obj !*.log
Pezani mafayilo onse koma osapatula mayeso a zikwatu, bin bin64: *.* !\mayesero !\bin*
Pezani m'mafayilo onse koma osaphatikiza zikwatu zonse zolowa kapena zolemba mobwerezabwereza: *.* !+\log*

find-in-files-dir-from-active-doc-tip.value: Lembani malo a Kalozera kutengera chikalata chogwira

find-status-top-reached.value: Pezani: Zolemba zomwe zafika poyambira, zomwe zimachitika koyamba kuchokera pansi zapezeka.

find-status-end-reached.value: Pezani: Kufikira kumapeto kwa chikalata, kupezeka koyamba kuchokera pamwamba papezeka.

find-status-replaceinfiles-1-replaced.value: Sinthani mu Mafayilo: 1 zomwe zachitika zidasinthidwa

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-1-repla.value: Bwezerani mu Mafayilo Otsegulidwa: Zochitika 1 zidasinthidwa

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-nb-repl.value: Sinthani mu Mafayilo Otsegulidwa: $INT_REPLACE$ zomwe zachitika zidasinthidwa

find-status-replaceall-readonly.value: Sinthani Zonse: Sizingatheke kusintha mawu.Chikalata chapano chikuwerengedwa kokha

find-status-replace-end-reached.value: Bwezerani: Kufikira kumapeto kwa chikalata, kuyambira pamwamba.

find-status-replace-top-reached.value: Bwezerani: Chikalata chomwe chafika poyambira, kuyambira pansi.

find-status-replaced-next-found.value: M'malo: 1 zomwe zachitika zidasinthidwa.Chochitika chotsatira chapezeka.

find-status-replaced-next-not-found.value: M'malo: 1 zomwe zachitika zidasinthidwa.Palibe zopezekanso zomwe zapezeka.

find-status-replace-readonly.value: Bwezerani: Sizingatheke kusintha mawu.Chikalata chapano chikuwerengedwa kokha

find-status-cannot-find-pebkac-maybe.value: Zomwe zachitika sizikupezeka.Mwina mwayiwala kuchongani "Mangirirani" (mpaka ONANI), "Match case" (KUTI WOZIMITSA), kapena "Gwirizanitsani mawu onse okha" (kuti ZIMAYI).

find-status-scope-forward.value: kuchokera ku caret mpaka kumapeto kwa fayilo

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat.value: Zilembo zosaoneka zomwe zalembedwa "Pezani zomwe" kapena "Bwezerani" zomwe zili

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat-tip.value: Chenjezo: Zilembo zosawoneka pakusaka (kapena kusintha) malo. Zolemba zomwe zayikidwa mu gawoli zili ndi zilembo zosawoneka (mwina zomaliza).Ngati mupitiliza popanda kuzichotsa, zidzaphatikizidwa pakusaka (kapena kusintha) mawu.

replace-in-files-confirm-directory.value: Mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kusintha zochitika zonse mu:

replace-in-projects-confirm-message.value: Kodi mukufuna kusintha zochitika zonse muzolemba zonse za Project Panel(ma) zomwe zasankhidwa?

replace-in-open-docs-confirm-message.value: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kusintha zonse zomwe zimachitika m'mapepala onse otsegula?

find-result-title-info-extra.value: - Njira Zosefera Mzere: onetsani zotsatira zosefedwa

session-save-folder-as-workspace.value: Sungani Foda Monga Malo Ogwirira Ntchito

IncrementalFind-FSTopReached.value: Kufika pamwamba pa tsamba, kupitilira kuchokera pansi

IncrementalFind-FSEndReached.value: Kufikira kumapeto kwa tsamba, kupitilira kuchokera pamwamba

largeFileRestriction-tip.value:
Zina zitha kuchedwetsa magwiridwe antchito pamafayilo akulu.Izi zitha kuzimitsidwa zokha mukatsegula fayilo yayikulu.Mutha kusintha mwamakonda apa.
ZINDIKIRANI: 1. Kusintha zosankha pano kumafuna kutsegulanso mafayilo akulu omwe atsegulidwa pano kuti mukhale ndi khalidwe labwino.
2. Ngati "Zimitsani Mawu Manga padziko lonse" ndi kufufuzidwa ndi inu kutsegula lalikulu wapamwamba, "Mawu Manga" adzakhala wolumala onse owona.Mutha kuyiyambitsanso kudzera pa menyu "Onani-> Kukulunga Mawu".

npcNote-tip.value:
Kuyimira kwa osankhidwa "omwe si ASCII" oyera komanso osasindikiza (kuwongolera).
ZINDIKIRANI: Kugwiritsa ntchito choyimira kudzalepheretsa mawonekedwe pamawu.
Kuti mupeze mndandanda wathunthu wamalo oyera osankhidwa ndi zilembo zosasindikiza onani Buku Logwiritsa Ntchito.
Dinani batani ili kuti mutsegule tsambalo ndi Buku Logwiritsa Ntchito.

npcAbbreviation-tip.value:
Chidule : dzina NBSP: malo osapumira ZWSP : danga la zero-width ZWNBSP : Ziro-width no-break space
Kuti muwone mndandanda wonse onani Buku Logwiritsa Ntchito. Dinani pa "?"batani kumanja kuti mutsegule tsambalo ndi Buku Logwiritsa Ntchito.

npcCodepoint-tip.value:
Codepoint : dzina U+00A0 : malo osapuma U+200B : malo m'lifupi ziro U+FEFF : zero-width no-break space
Kuti muwone mndandanda wonse onani Buku Logwiritsa Ntchito. Dinani pa "?"batani kumanja kuti mutsegule tsambalo ndi Buku Logwiritsa Ntchito.

npcCustomColor-tip.value: Pitani ku Style Configurator kuti musinthe mtundu wokhazikika wamalo oyera osankhidwa ndi zilembo zosasindikiza ("mtundu wa zilembo zomwe sizisindikiza").

npcIncludeCcUniEol-tip.value: Ikani mawonekedwe a zilembo zosasindikiza pa zilembo za C0, C1 ndi Unicode EOL (mzere wotsatira, cholekanitsa mizere ndi cholekanitsa ndime).

searchingInSelThresh-tip.value: Chiwerengero chochepa cha zilembo zosankhidwa mu zone yosinthira kuti muyang'ane bokosi la "Posankha" pomwe kukambirana kwa Pezani kutsegulidwa.Mtengo wokwanira ndi $INT_REPLACE$.Khazikitsani mtengo kukhala 0 kuti mulepheretse kuyang'ana pawokha.

searchingFillFindWhat-tip.value: Chiwerengero chachikulu cha zilembo zosankhidwa muzone yosinthira kuti mudzaze basi "Pezani chiyani" pamene Ctrl-F iyambika.Mtengo wokwanira ndi $INT_REPLACE$, womwe ndi kukula kwakukulu kwa gawo la "Pezani chiyani", lochepera ndi dongosolo.

verticalEdge-tip.value: Onjezani chikhomo chanu posonyeza malo ake ndi nambala ya decimal.Mutha kufotokozera zolembera zingapo pogwiritsa ntchito malo oyera kuti mulekanitse manambala osiyanasiyana.

fileSaveAsCopySaveButton-tip.value: Gwirani Shift kwinaku mukukanikiza Save kuti mutsegule kopiyo mukasunga.

autoIndentBasic-tip.value: Onetsetsani kuti kulowa kwa mzere wapano (ie, mzere watsopano wopangidwa mwa kukanikiza kiyi ENTER) ukufanana ndi kulowera kwa mzere wapitawo.

autoIndentAdvanced-tip.value:
Yambitsani kulondolera mwanzeru kwa zilankhulo za "C-like" ndi Python.Zilankhulo za "C-like" zimaphatikizapo: C, C++, Java, C#, Objective-C, PHP, JavaScript, JSP, CSS, Perl, Rust, PowerShell ndi JSON.
Ngati musankha zotsogola koma osasintha mafayilo m'zilankhulo zomwe tatchulazi, indentation ikhalabe mumayendedwe oyambira.

global-override-tip.value: Kuyang'anira "Global override" apa kudzachotsa gawolo m'zilankhulo zonse.Zomwe mukufuna kwenikweni ndikugwiritsa ntchito "Default Style" m'malo mwa

scintillaRenderingTechnology-tip.value: Mutha kupititsa patsogolo kumasulira kwa zilembo zapadera kapena kuthetsa zovuta zazithunzi, yambitsaninso Notepad ++ kuti mugwiritse ntchito zosinthazo.

toolbar-accent-tip.value: Izi zimapangitsa kuti zithunzi zanu zizitsatira mtundu wa kalembedwe ka Windows system.Mtundu wa kamvekedwe ndi mtundu wowunikira womwe umagwiritsidwa ntchito m'mabatani, malire, ndi matailosi a menyu Yoyambira mu Windows.Kuti musinthe, pitani ku Zikhazikiko> Kusintha Kwamunthu> Mitundu, kenako sankhani mtundu wa mawu omwe mumakonda.

len-limit-exceeded-tip.value: Kutalika kwapyola malire: Zomwe mwalemba zitha kupitilira malire ololedwa ndipo zikadachepetsedwa, ndipo sizisungidwa gawo lotsatira.

max-len-on-search-tip.value: Zomwe mwalemba zitha kupitilira malire ololedwa ndipo zikadachepetsedwa, ndipo sizisungidwa gawo lotsatira.

max-len-on-save-tip.value: Kutalika kwa zomwe mwalemba ndi zazitali kwambiri ndipo mwina sizingasungidwe mu gawo lotsatira.

tabbar-tabcompactlabellen-tip.value: Imaletsa kutalika kwa mayina a ma tabu aatali.Lowani kuti mugwiritse ntchito mtengo womwe mwapatsidwa.Kusiyanasiyana kwamtengo: zilembo 1-257 (0 imalepheretsa kudulidwa).
